name: agent_name
description: Use for a narrow, specific subagent responsibility. This is what the parent agent reads to decide when to delegate.
mission: Own one narrow responsibility. One or two sentences max.
scope_not_allowed: Do adjacent work outside this role.
Spawn additional agents unless the parent explicitly asks.

extra_sections.heading: Domain Framework
extra_sections.body: Optional. Use for domain-specific content that doesn't fit Mission/Scope/Inputs/Output — e.g. a review framework, severity table, or workflow steps. Rendered verbatim as its own heading between Scope and Inputs. Omit this field entirely when the role needs nothing beyond the standard sections.

inputs: Expect the parent agent to provide the task, relevant files or context, and expected output.
output: Return concise findings, file references when relevant, validation performed, and remaining risks.
stop_conditions: Stop and report when the task is complete, blocked, out of scope, or requires approval.
escalation: Hand back destructive operations, broad scope changes, missing credentials, production impact, or unclear requirements.

skill_dependencies.when: Use when the task needs that capability.
